title: Perform Basic Arithmetic Operations
user_story: As a user, I want to enter two numbers and select an operation (addition, subtraction, or multiplication), so that I can quickly calculate the result.
acceptance_criteria: The interface displays input fields for two numeric values.
The interface provides buttons or dropdown options for addition, subtraction, and multiplication.
Clicking a 'Calculate' button processes the inputs and operation.
The correct mathematical result is displayed on the screen after calculation.
Empty inputs are handled gracefully by showing an error message.
